Welcome to African Flowers

​African Flowers is dedicated to the study and celebration of the continent’s rich, diverse, and stunning floral heritage. We believe these natural masterpieces, from the resilient Fynbos to the vibrant tropical species, are a true 8th Wonder of the World. Our app provides an educational and engaging experience, offering detailed history, lessons on cultivation, interactive quizzes, and direct connections to regional retailers. We are a passionate team based in South Africa, committed to sharing the beauty and stories of African flora with the global c ommunity.
